identificationModule.briefTitle: Real-world Clinical Effectiveness and Patient Insight Associated With Adding Sodium Glucose Co-transporter 2 Inhibitor to Gliclazide Modified Release
identificationModule.officialTitle: A Retrospective Chart Review Combined With a Prospective Cross-sectional Survey and Interviews on Patients With Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus to Assess Effectiveness of Adding SodiumGlucose Co-transporter 2 Inhibitor to Gliclazide Modified Release

descriptionModule.briefSummary:
The study objectives are to assess over the gliclazide MR-SGLT2i combined treatment course in patients with T2DM adding SGLT2i to gliclazide MR-based therapy.

The primary objective is to determine the effectiveness of adding SGLT2i to gliclazide MR-based therapy in patients with T2DM, as measured by HbA1c changes.

armGroups.label: population description
armGroups.description: adult patients with T2DM who initiated add-on SGLT2i treatment to gliclazide MR 60 mg, in routine practice

primaryOutcomes.measure: effectiveness of adding SGLT2i to gliclazide MR
primaryOutcomes.description: To determine the effectiveness of adding SGLT2i to gliclazide MR-based therapy in patients with T2DM, as measured by HbA1c changes (in %)
primaryOutcomes.timeFrame: from index date (date of SGLT2i adding to gliclazide MR) to discontinuation of the combination (at least 2 months) or date of data collection initiation during the eligibility period, loss to follow-up, or death, whichever occurs first (approx 2 months)

eligibilityModule.eligibilityCriteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Patient diagnosed with T2DM for at least two years prior to index date
* Patient aged ≥18 years at the index date
* Patient naïve to SGLT2i prior to index date
* Patient treated with gliclazide MR at a minimum daily dose of 60 mg at the index date
* Starting treatment with SGLT2i added to gliclazide MR based therapy, during the eligibility period, with a minimum of 60 days of combined gliclazide MR-SGLT2i treatment
* Presence of at least two assessments of HbA1c laboratory test results from the medical records

Exclusion Criteria:

* Diagnosis of diabetes other than T2DM (e.g., type 1, gestational) at index date
* Use of antidiabetic drugs other than those permitted by the inclusion criteria, at index date
eligibilityModule.studyPopulation: Male and female who are treated by Gliclazide MR 60 at index date and who started with SGLT2i added to gliclazide MR with a minimum of 60 days of these combined treatments during the eligibility period

references.citation: Moreira RO, Nicodemus NA Jr, Comlekci A, Yu M, Almalki MH. ADD2Dia: Real-World Clinical Effectiveness of Adding a Sodium-Glucose Cotransporter 2 Inhibitor to Gliclazide-Based Therapy in Type 2 Diabetes. Adv Ther. 2025 Dec;42(12):6295-6309. doi: 10.1007/s12325-025-03394-2. Epub 2025 Nov 1.
